calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-27-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-27-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: May 27, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Altlantic Credit and Finance, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Daryl Hackbart.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 21, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alantic Credit and Finance, Inc., and against defendant DARYL HACKBART as follows:

Damages/Principal - $8,783.58.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $660.00.
Costs - $245., for a total of $9,688.58.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than Tuesday, June 3, 2008.

Notice And Motion For Order That Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth a. Macdonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Atlantic Credit and Finance, Inc.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Atlantic Credit And Finance Inc.'s motion to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Set For Trial On May-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
